one_time_description: Allowance for loan receivable impairment of $3,200,000 recorded as non-cash item
economic_notes: Town centre development undertaken within community. Holds 51% interest in Spirit Bay Developments Limited Partnership and 99% interest in M'inuw'ilum Marina Limited Partnership. Also holds 20% in Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd and wholly owns Sc'ianew Development Corporation and 1106670 BC Ltd.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) tangible capital assets not fully recorded per PSAS requirements for roads, bridges, water/utility systems; (2) investments in GBEs/limited partnerships unaudited or financial info not available — auditor could not verify carrying values; (3) town centre development expenditures subject to contingency of future repayment. Prior year figures restated per Note 19. Large allowance for loan receivable impairment of $3.2M recorded. Loans receivable dropped from $2,430,000 to $30,000 year over year.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
